title: Amtech R0360 4 Piece mini Hook and Pick Set

features: COMPREHENSIVE: This handy set includes a full hook, an angle hook, a 90-degree hook and a straight pick.
VERSATILE: They are ideal for separating wires, removing small fuses and 'O' rings, retrieving washers and other loose parts
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 4x hook and pick See more
